items.name_en: The Butterfly Buckle (Bow Shoulder Bag) has become a Bottega Veneta bestseller with its unique elegance. This new leather & canvas version is perfectly tailored for spring and summer. The natural laziness of the linen fabric and chestnut leather bring out a strong vintage vibe, offering a unique charm that differs from the all-leather version.
items.name_cn:
The Butterfly Buckle (Bow Shoulder Bag) has become a Bottega Veneta bestseller with its unique elegance. This new leather & canvas version is perfectly tailored for spring and summer. The natural laziness of the linen fabric and chestnut leather bring out a strong vintage vibe, offering a unique charm that differs from the all-leather version.
Model: 789039
Size: 40*48*20cm

items.name_en: Genuine leather grain texture, soft and premium—those who touch it will understand. BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 New Men's Intrecciato Camera Bag features grain leather paired with classic weaving, elevating the texture and durability. The matte finish is perfect for autumn and winter outfits. In terms of capacity, this bag is no less impressive than others, with an interior compartment for easy storage of essentials.

items.name_en: Different colors spark unique brilliance, and different materials create depth and design. BOTTEGA VENETA Wallace appears in the Retro Denim series. The structured denim pairs with soft leather. Fashion has no standard; innovation is progress. Retro denim, a blend of classic and personal style, casual and lazy yet unique. The extra-large capacity is great for summer, freeing your hands in hot weather.

items.name_en: Reinventing the classic, the Swing is back. BOTTEGA VENETA Women's Swing Tote features tubular padded weaving, creating a unique vertical texture that is memorable. It exudes a vintage vibe, aligning with current retro trends. Simple yet versatile and personal, it adapts easily to different styles for work or commuting. Designed for both shoulder and hand carry, it is a bag that balances practicality and beauty [Jump][Jump]

items.name_en: Optional 8mm buckle strap + 100
items.name_cn:
Optional 8mm buckle strap + 100
Bottega Veneta BV Gemelli Twin Bag (Shu Qi Style) Pre-locked, 2024 Bestseller 💕 The Gemelli consists of two crescent bags paired together, featuring the brand's signature intrecciato weaving. It comes with a detachable tubular handle, serving as a clutch, shoulder bag, or with the small crescent flipped to serve as a handle. The dual design is full of personality and charm, creating a visual impact that brings an elegant and fashionable feel. The unique structural design creates duality and volume
Multiple carrying styles to meet different needs and occasions
Style No.: 764053
Size: 42*30*12cm
